source_of_truth: All cpu_verify.json files under the staged sweep directory with result_count >= 1, resolved back to generated reader target rows and Gordon literal verification results.
notes: Stage C was intentionally stopped after the remaining preferred phrase pair hit and the next hit was non-preferred, indicating preferred phrase-pair processing had moved on.
Each hit contains the reader-side settings that produced the ciphertext and the first CPU-verified Gordon literal setting returned by the solver for that ciphertext.
This is not a full literal expansion of every hit; use these rows to choose which phrase/settings combinations to expand next.
